name: expense
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for tracking, categorizing, and reporting expenses. Covers personal spending, employee reimbursement, freelancer tax deductions, and small business financial records.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.expense_logging: Captures expenses with all details needed for reimbursement or tax records
capabilities.spending_analysis: Identifies patterns and categories where spending exceeds intentions
capabilities.reimbursement_reports: Builds expense reports that meet company policy requirements
capabilities.tax_preparation: Organizes business expenses by deduction category for tax filing
capabilities.receipt_management: Documents expenses with or without physical receipts
capabilities.budget_tracking: Monitors spending against budget by category throughout the month

heartbeat.daily: Log expenses while details are fresh
heartbeat.weekly: Check for duplicate charges and reimbursable items
heartbeat.monthly: Full spending review and expense report submission
heartbeat.quarterly: Strategic review and estimated tax calculation
heartbeat.annual: Complete expense audit for tax preparation

audience: Freelancers and self-employed capturing tax deductions
Small business owners managing financial records
Individuals monitoring personal spending against budget
Anyone preparing for tax season with business expenses
